 • Where the documentation shows that the dosage is being adjusted, 
monitoring would be reasonable and necessary as ordered by the 
physician or allowed practitioner. 
 • Where the results are stable within the therapeutic ranges, monthly 
monitoring would be reasonable and necessary. 
 • Where the results remain within nontherapeutic ranges, there must be 
specific documentation of the factors
